title: KittenClient
description: A clean, PvP-focused Fabric client with free cosmetics, safety mods, and optimized visuals. Github link in description
body:
# 🐱 Kitten Client

Kitten Client is a **clean, performance-focused PvP modpack** for  
**Minecraft 1.21.11 (Fabric)**.

It is designed to provide **high FPS**, essential PvP utilities, and a clean visual style — without unnecessary bloat.

---

## 🚀 Features

- ⚡ High-performance optimization mods (Sodium-based stack)
- 🗡️ PvP utilities: HUDs, keystrokes, potion timers, commands
- 🎨 Clean Bare Bones–style visuals
- 🧢 Cape support (OptiFine-compatible & custom)
- 🎤 Simple Voice Chat support
- ⚙️ Client-side only (safe for servers)

---

## 🎨 Resource Packs Included

- Bare Bones  
- Small Tools  
- Small Handhelds  

> These packs provide small tools, reduced visual clutter, and a clean PvP look.

---

## 🔧 Optional PvP Overlay (Manual Install)

For reduced fire, potion particles, and shield size, you may manually install a **Bare Bones PvP Overlay** by *TheobaldTheBird*.

This overlay is **not included** in the modpack download and must be installed manually.

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install the **Modrinth App**
2. Search for **Kitten Client**
3. Click **Install**
4. Launch and play

---

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

Kitten Client is a **modpack**, not a hacked client.
All included mods are client-side and designed to comply with server rules.

---
